/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pPointAssign.dir/PointAssign.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pPointAssign.dir/PointAssign_Info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pPointAssign.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../bin/pPointAssign   -L/Users/georgedimitropoulos/Documents/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/georgedimitropoulos/Documents/moos-ivp/lib /Users/georgedimitropoulos/Documents/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSCore/lib/libMOOS.a -lapputil -lgeometry -lmbutil -lm -lpthread
